subcodes.first_line: O tailor! Take in hand the thread of Mary and mend the wounds of the horizons; fashion the garment of Joseph, that the fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خیاط رشته مریمی بدست آر و زخم آفاق را رفو نما قمیص یوسفی بدوز تا نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @spiritual transformation
